news.headline: From escaping child marriage 'to an old pervert' to becoming Sierra Leone's first lady
news.summary: The private world of one of Africa's most powerful political women is revealed in a BBC World Service exclusive.

news.headline: Trump holds prayer rally to ‘rededicate’ US as ‘one nation under God’
news.summary: Critics have denounced the event as a blurring of the separation of church and state mandated by the US Constitution.

news.headline: US citizens in DR Congo potentially exposed to Ebola in outbreak, report says
